title: antiaris toxicaria var. usambarensis
intro: Antiaris toxicaria var. usambarensis, also known as the Usambarensis tree, is a variant of the Antiaris toxicaria tree, which is a species of plant in the family Moraceae. The medicinal properties of Antiaris toxicaria var. usambarensis include its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which make it a potential candidate for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Antiaris toxicaria var. usambarensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves, bark, or roots in hot water or a solvent.
